results.description:
Everyone believes that Lenora Hope is a mass murderer.

When the Hope family was massacred decades ago, she was the only one left after that tragic night.

Mute, paralysed and confined to a wheelchair, Lenora has never been able to tell her side of the story.

Until her new live-in caregiver Kit brings her a typewriter.

And with one working finger Lenora begins to type:

I want to tell you everything.

THE HEART-POUNDING GOTHIC THRILLER FROM THE INTERNATIONALLY BESTSELLING AUTHOR

Readers LOVE The Only One Left:

'Plot twists on plot twists! A story that keeps you guessing throughout' ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

'Kept me guessing to the very end' ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

'I devoured this in a single sitting' ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

'Laden with an abundance of twists and turns that are truly mind-bending' ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

'The ending though . . . didn't see that one coming!' ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

'Riley never fails . . . now to wait for the next book...' ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

And your favourite authors love it too . . .
